name: Show-Off Beef Tenderloin
recipeIngredient: 5 pounds whole beef tenderloin, up to 6 pounds,
1 cup port wine, or other dry red wine
1 teaspoon dried thyme, or 1 fresh sprig thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Make small slits in the tenderloin and insert the garlic slivers; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine all the remaining ingredients; mix well. Add the tenderloin, cover, and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 6 hours or overnight.
3. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F. Coat a roasting pan with nonstick cooking spray. Remove the meat from the marinade and place in the pan, discarding the marinade.
4. Roast the meat for 35 to 40 minutes for medium-rare or to desired doneness. Allow to sit for 15 minutes before slicing crosswise to serve.
Serves: 10 to 12
